parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ email: $json.email, full_name: $json.full_name, test_type: $json.test_type, disciplines: $json.disciplines, answers: $json.answers, network_id: $json.network_id, tags: $json.tags, response_type: $json.response_type, submitted_at: $json.submitted_at }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const res = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { status: res.success ? 'ok' : 'hata', task_updated: res.task_updated || false, match_warning: res.match_warning || false, email: $('Satiri Ayikla').first().json.email, error: res.error || null } }];
